news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs

overview.description: The JPMorgan Limited Duration Bond ETF (JPLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests mainly in a broad portfolio of investment grade asset-backed and mortgage-backed securities with an average duration of three years or less. JPLD was launched on Jul 28, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the firm has successfully completed the conversion of four mutual funds to ETFs.
